description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun featuring a robust, dark metal barrel with a ventilated rib running along the top for improved sighting and heat dissipation. The stock and fore-end are crafted from polished wood, displaying a rich brown grain that contrasts with the matte black metal components. The receiver is compact and streamlined, with a visible trigger guard and a pump mechanism located beneath the barrel. The muzzle is circular and open, and the overall length suggests a standard, full-sized shotgun suitable for urban or sporting use. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionate, providing protection for the trigger while allowing easy access. The shotgun's design is both functional and visually appealing, with a blend of traditional and modern elements.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a dark metal barrel, ventilated rib, and polished wooden stock and fore-end. The design is classic and functional, with a rounded trigger guard and visible pump mechanism.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, fore-end, and the ventilated rib atop the barrel.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular muzzle opening and the alignment of the ribbed barrel, with the wooden stock barely visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the other profile of the shotgun, again emphasizing the wood and metal contrast and the pump mechanism.
description_view_3: Top-down view showing the width of the stock and fore-end, as well as the ribbed barrel and overall slim profile.
attribute_barrel_configuration: Single-barrel with a ventilated rib along the top.
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement.
